receiverCases.expected: The receiver callback is skipped, the transfer succeeds, approval is cleared, balances and ownership update once, and exactly one ordered Transfer log is committed.
The callback receives the exact token caller, operator, from, token id, and data; the transfer succeeds and approval is cleared.
The exact project-owned ERC721 receiver Error(string) is returned and ownership, balances, approval, and committed logs roll back.
Non-empty receiver revert data is bubbled exactly, empty receiver revert data maps to the project-owned ERC721 receiver Error(string), and state and logs roll back.
A receiver under construction has zero code length, the callback is skipped while minting or transferring to it, and a later self-transfer invokes the callback exactly once.
